disclosure.text: Affiliate Disclosure: We may earn commissions from qualifying purchases through links on this site. This doesn't affect our rankings or reviews — our scoring is 100% data-driven.

faq.safeAudited: Yes. {vpn} has an independently audited no-logs policy verified by {firm}. It uses AES-256 encryption and includes a kill switch and DNS leak protection.
faq.safeBasic: Yes. {vpn} uses AES-256 encryption and includes standard security features like a kill switch and DNS leak protection.
faq.netflixYes: Yes, {vpn} works with Netflix US, UK, and most other regional libraries in our {month} {year} testing.
faq.netflixNo: In our {month} {year} testing, {vpn} had limited Netflix support. We recommend NordVPN or ExpressVPN for reliable Netflix access.
faq.howManyDevices: How many devices can I use with {vpn}?
faq.moneyBackYes: Yes, {vpn} offers a {days}-day money-back guarantee. No questions asked.
faq.moneyBackCheck: Check {vpn}'s website for their current refund policy.
